subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter was received. I hope that thine end may be blessed and the means of comfort and tranquility secured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی نامه شما رسید امیدوارم که عاقبت تو خیر باشد و اسباب آسایش و راحت
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort
